title: Operate a handheld GPS device
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate a handheld GPS device demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan GPS operations

pcs.text: Identify purpose and use of the GPS and data collected from supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purpose and use of the GPS and data collected from supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purpose and use of the GPS and data collected from supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Prepare equipment and materials for GPS operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare equipment and materials for GPS operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare equipment and materials for GPS operations.

pcs.text: Identify key operational parameters, and adjust GPS device settings according to operator manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify key operational parameters, and adjust GPS device settings according to operator manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key operational parameters, and adjust GPS device settings according to operator manual.

pcs.text: Source and upload support data to GPS device
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and upload support data to GPS device?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and upload support data to GPS device.

pcs.text: Plan power supply strategy for field operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan power supply strategy for field operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan power supply strategy for field operations.

pcs.text: Assist with the identification of fieldwork health and safety hazards, and apply controls according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with the identification of fieldwork health and safety hazards, and apply controls according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with the identification of fieldwork health and safety hazards, and apply controls according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan GPS operations

elements.title: Collect, use and store GPS information in the field

pcs.text: Establish accuracy of device for current position
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish accuracy of device for current position?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish accuracy of device for current position.

pcs.text: Clear GPS logs to establish starting point for temporal data sequence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear GPS logs to establish starting point for temporal data sequence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear GPS logs to establish starting point for temporal data sequence.

pcs.text: Operate handheld device to perform basic functions and record spatial and temporal data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate handheld device to perform basic functions and record spatial and temporal data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate handheld device to perform basic functions and record spatial and temporal data.

pcs.text: Manage power supply for portable devices for field operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage power supply for portable devices for field operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage power supply for portable devices for field operations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect, use and store GPS information in the field

elements.title: Use basic software to retrieve, manipulate, display and store GPS data

pcs.text: Select software required for GPS data manipulation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select software required for GPS data manipulation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select software required for GPS data manipulation.

pcs.text: Upload/sync GPS data from handheld device
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Upload/sync GPS data from handheld device?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Upload/sync GPS data from handheld device.

pcs.text: Sort and categorise data for storage according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sort and categorise data for storage according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sort and categorise data for storage according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Manipulate and edit data and data sets according to software procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manipulate and edit data and data sets according to software procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manipulate and edit data and data sets according to software procedures.

pcs.text: Create simple visual reports for data interpretation and display
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Create simple visual reports for data interpretation and display?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Create simple visual reports for data interpretation and display.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Use basic software to retrieve, manipulate, display and store GPS data

elements.title: Shut down, maintain and store handheld GPS equipment

pcs.text: Turn off GPS device and prepare for storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Turn off GPS device and prepare for storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Turn off GPS device and prepare for storage.

pcs.text: Record GPS use and identified faults according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record GPS use and identified faults according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record GPS use and identified faults according to workplace procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store GPS device?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store GPS device.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Shut down, maintain and store handheld GPS equipment

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
